_comment: Config for hms_dss_to_gnuplot.py. Reads exact C-part 'FLOW' (computed outflow hydrographs) from the HMS run DSS files and groups them. 'match' patterns test against the DSS B-part (location). The same location appears in both storms; the curve label includes the storm so they are distinguishable.
_groups_note: Each group -> one .gp.dat + one PNG. Find the true outlet element name from the console location list and set the 'outlet' group accordingly (e.g. 'Sink_1').
